role.description: Role of the entity that created the message.
role.title: Role

parts.description: List of message parts that make up the message content.
parts.title: Parts

GenericPart.description:
Represents an arbitrary message part with any type and properties.
This allows for extensibility with custom message part types.

type.description: The type of the content captured in this part.
type.title: Type

GenericPart.title: GenericPart

UriPart.description: Represents an external referenced file sent to the model by URI

type.description: The type of the content captured in this part.
type.title: Type

mime_type.description: The IANA MIME type of the attached data.
mime_type.title: MimeType

modality.description: The general modality of the data if it is known.
modality.title: Modality

uri.description: A URI referencing attached data. It should not be a base64 data URL, which should use the `blob` part instead. The URI may use a scheme known to the provider api (e.g. `gs://bucket/object.png`), or be a publicly accessible location.
uri.title: Uri

UriPart.title: UriPart

FilePart.description: Represents an external referenced file sent to the model by file id

type.description: The type of the content captured in this part.
type.title: Type

mime_type.description: The IANA MIME type of the attached data.
mime_type.title: MimeType

modality.description: The general modality of the data if it is known.
modality.title: Modality

file_id.description: An identifier referencing a file that was pre-uploaded to the provider.
file_id.title: FileId

FilePart.title: FilePart

BlobPart.description: Represents blob binary data sent inline to the model

type.description: The type of the content captured in this part.
type.title: Type

mime_type.description: The IANA MIME type of the attached data.
mime_type.title: MimeType

modality.description: The general modality of the data if it is known.
modality.title: Modality

content.description: Raw bytes of the attached data. This field SHOULD be encoded as a base64 string when serialized to JSON.
content.title: Content

BlobPart.title: BlobPart

TextPart.description: Represents text content sent to or received from the model.

type.description: The type of the content captured in this part.
type.title: Type

content.description: Text content sent to or received from the model.
content.title: Content

TextPart.title: TextPart

ToolCallRequestPart.description: Represents a tool call requested by the model.

type.description: The type of the content captured in this part.
type.title: Type

id.description: Unique identifier for the tool call.
id.title: Id

ToolCallRequestPart.title: ToolCallRequestPart

ToolCallResponsePart.description: Represents a tool call result sent to the model or a built-in tool call outcome and details.

type.description: The type of the content captured in this part.
type.title: Type

ToolCallResponsePart.title: ToolCallResponsePart

description: Represents the list of input messages sent to the model.
title: InputMessages
